    1. selectSlot(String)

Interface CursorDeviceSlot

All Superinterfaces:
DeviceChain, ObjectProxy, Subscribable
public interface CursorDeviceSlot extends DeviceChain
Instances of this interface represent the selected device slot as shown in the Bitwig Studio user interface.
Since:
API version 1
